bird.name: 白頂信天翁
bird.summary: 白頂信天翁（學名：Thalassarche cauta），也稱為羞怯信天翁（shy mollymawk），是一種中型信天翁，在澳大利亞塔斯馬尼亞海岸外的三個偏遠島嶼上繁殖，位於南印度洋。其壽命約為60年，並曾在遠至南非和美國太平洋沿岸的地方被發現。截至截至2020年6月年 (2…

relations.subject: 白頂信天翁
relations.evidence: (2008) Finally, the Australasian gannet, Morus serrator is the primary threat to their survival. In June 2020, the Australian Government changed the status of the bird under the Environment Protection and Biodiversity Conservation Act 1999 from "Vulnerable" to "Endangered", with the bird facing the main threats from climate change and fisheries (as bycatch victims, either caught in trawling nets, or on hooks in the longline fishing industry), as well as disease and competition with other seabirds
relations.object_summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。
